name: NovaERP
description: A comprehensive ERP solution that integrates finance, HR, inventory, procurement, and operations into a single unified platform. Built for scalability and ease of use.

name: NovaCRM
description: A powerful CRM platform designed to help sales teams manage leads, automate workflows, and close deals faster while delivering exceptional customer experiences.

name: NovaHR
description: An end-to-end HR management system covering recruitment, onboarding, performance management, payroll, and employee self-service portals.

name: NovaDesk
description: A modern IT service management platform with smart ticketing, asset tracking, SLA management, and self-service knowledge base.
